violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large rodent burrows by the foundation. The foundation was observed damaged. Damage to foundation must be repaired to close entry to pests. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with licensed pest control. Establishment is to seal damage around building on the foundation, establishment is to work with pest control to effectively fill rodent burrows. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas around equipment and under equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Machine was emptied during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to send photo of clean and sanitized machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of ice machine was observed with a slight accumulation of brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

The floor in the walk-in freezer area and production area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
